attributes.action: Require Mayor Khan to repair both Albert Bridge and Hammersmith Bridge urgently
attributes.additional_details: London should be a City to be proud of.  For that we need proper transport links, something that Mayor Khan has always stated to be one of his prime objectives.  However he cannot ignore the fact that travel by car is an inevitable and important aspect of those travel links.  By allowing two road bridges in London to remain closed without carrying out urgent repairs is an abrogation of his duties to Londoners, something which he should be required to address
attributes.background: Require Mayor Khan to repair both Albert Bridge and Hammersmith Bridge urgently so as to ensure the proper circulation of traffic and reduce congestion (which is one of his stated aims) using funds generated from motorists in London for example from congestion charge

rejection.details:
This is the responsibility of the Greater London Authority:
